SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BukkitEffectsInitializer
Bukkit-side initializer for EffectFactory.
BukkitValueCoercer
Bukkit-side implementation of ValueCoercer.
Effect<T>
Platform-neutral effect base.
Effect<T>
 
EffectFactory
Factory and registry for Effect prototypes, keyed by name.
EffectFactory
 
EffectRuntime
Platform-neutral runtime surface for the effects API.
EffectsAPI
 
EffectsAPIMainCommand
 
EffectsAPIMainCommand
 
EffectsGroupKeys
Fixed inner-field schema for one effect-group YAML file under <pluginDir>/effects/<groupName>.yml (see effects-api-ADR-005).
EffectTarget
Platform-neutral target for a single Effect application.
FabricEffectRuntime
Fabric scheduler chokepoint for the effects API.
FabricEffectRuntime.LogSink
Receives diagnostic log messages from effects-api/fabric.
FabricEffectRuntime.ParticleDispatcher
Spawns particles at (x,y,z) for recipient (or broadcast to the level when implementations choose).
FabricEffectRuntime.PotionDispatcher
Builds and applies a MobEffectInstance to player.
FabricEffectRuntime.SoundDispatcher
Plays a sound directly to player.
FabricEffectsInitializer
Fabric-side initializer for EffectFactory, per effects-api-ADR-003 + ADR-004.
FabricParticleEffect
Fabric counterpart of io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.LocalEffects.ParticleEffect.
FabricParticleKeys
Per-effect data keys for FabricParticleEffect.
FabricPotionEffect
Fabric counterpart of io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.LocalEffects.PotionEffect.
FabricPotionKeys
Per-effect data keys for FabricPotionEffect.
FabricRegistryCompat
Cross-version shim for Registry#get(ResourceLocation) drift.
FabricSoundEffect
Fabric counterpart of io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.bukkit.LocalEffects.SoundEffect per effects-api-ADR-003.
FabricSoundKeys
Per-effect data keys for FabricSoundEffect.
FabricTitleEffect
Fabric counterpart of BukkitTitleEffect-equivalent — sends a vanilla title overlay via the Mojmap clientbound title packets.
FabricTitleKeys
Per-effect data keys for FabricTitleEffect.
FabricValueCoercer
Fabric-side ValueCoercer implementation per effects-api-ADR-004.

FireworkTypeNames

GenericEffectCommand<T>
 
GenericEffectCommand<T>
 
GlideEffect
Post-teleport glide effect (effects-api-ADR-001).
GlideSafetyListener
Listener + state holder for GlideEffect (effects-api-ADR-001).
GlideSafetyListener.GlideState
Per-player glide state.
GlideTypeNames
Positional / type-driven keys for GlideEffect.
NoteCommand
 
NoteCommand
 
NoteEffect
 
NoteEffect
 
NoteEffect_1_12
 
NoteEffect_1_12
 
NoteTypeNames
 
NoteTypeNames
 
ParticleCommand
 
ParticleCommand
 
ParticleEffect
 
ParticleEffect
 
ParticleTypeNames
 
ParticleTypeNames
 
PlayerGlideEvent
Fired by GlideEffect when a player is placed into glide mode after a teleport.
PlayerLandEvent
Fired by GlideEffect when a gliding player lands (touches ground, runs out of timeout, disconnects, or is placed at shutdown).
PlayerLandEvent.Reason

TestCommand
 
TestCommand
 
TypeKey
Closed enumeration of logical value types understood by the ValueCoercer SPI.
ValueCoercer
Per-platform leaf operations of the effects-api-ADR-002 adaptive reading order.
